codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested Welcome variants: unlock error modal state, multi-profile rows with Unlock/Rotate, and a scrollable many-profile layout with overflow indicator and preserved first-time/single-profile behavior. I found no blocking correctness issues; one non-blocking robustness gap remains in overflow-indicator counting.

issues.description: The hidden-row indicator count is computed with an approximate fixed row height and Math.round(remaining / 112). This can undercount/overcount and may briefly hide the indicator before the list is truly at bottom for certain content heights. Use a deterministic approach (e.g., Math.ceil with measured row height, or sentinel/intersection-based overflow detection) to keep the indicator behavior stable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill requires invoking the agent-browser skill, but the worker used direct `agent-browser` CLI commands throughout and still completed verification successfully; this suggests the procedure wording is stricter than actual workflow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session e42015ee-b27e-4b28-93ea-eeb15fa07174) shows many `Execute` calls using `agent-browser ...` and no `Skill` call for `agent-browser`; .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md says "Required Skills: agent-browser" and "Invoke `agent-browser` skill".

sharedStateObservations.observation: Manual verification required discovering IndexedDB profile key conventions ad hoc; this setup knowledge is not captured in shared testing docs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker debugging injected profile data and then reading src/lib/storage/profileStore.ts to find `igloo.web-demo-v2.profile-index`; .factory/library/user-testing.md notes that IndexedDB persists but does not document key names/data-shape guidance for seeding profile states.

summary: Review passed for welcome-enhancements. The feature implementation meets the requested behavior and preserves existing welcome variants, with no blocking defects identified; one non-blocking improvement is recommended for overflow-indicator count robustness.
